meaning: n.胡闹,开玩笑,恶作剧vt.装饰,打扮vi.打扮得漂亮
examples: Removing the boxes will reduce the number of prank calls without hampering people's ability to report a fire.
The vast majority of false fire alarms are prank calls made anonymously from fire alarm boxes on street corners.
No way was I going to let him pull a prank—ruining someone's Valentine's Day.
Leuco thought it was a prank, until he saw that the message indeed derived from Vatican City.
However, he said that the chances of this particular prank being foreseen were "very low indeed".
